description.ko: 식물에서 영감을 받은 구조가 고급 디지털 신경망과 통합되어 광섬유 꽃잎을 통해 부드러운 청록색 빛을 발산하는 인공 식물학의 추상적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A speculative exploration of synthetic botany where flora-inspired structures are integrated with advanced digital neural networks, emitting a soft cyan glow through fiber-optic petals.

prompt: Macro photography of FLORA-9, a futuristic digital flower with translucent glass petals containing glowing fiber-optic veins, pulsing with cyan and violet light, intricate circuit board patterns on the stem, bokeh background of a high-tech laboratory, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic, digital nature theme.
